---
id: get-dj-artist-suggestions
title: "Get artist suggestions"
description: "Returns a list of artist suggestions derived from the user's library. Used for autocomplete in DJ and mixtape forms."
sidebar_label: "Get artist suggestions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/spotter-api

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get artist suggestions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vibes/djs/suggestions/artists"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a list of artist suggestions derived from the user's library. Used for autocomplete in DJ and mixtape forms.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./get-dj-artist-suggestions.RequestSchema.json")}
>
